name: Classic White T-Shirt
description: A timeless white crew-neck tee made from 100% organic cotton. Pairs easily with any bottom for an effortless everyday look.

name: Chunky Knit Sweater
description: A chunky ribbed-knit sweater in a relaxed oversized fit. Perfect for cold days when you want warmth without sacrificing style.

name: Oxford Button-Down Shirt
description: A crisp Oxford cloth button-down shirt with a slim tailored cut. Versatile enough to go from desk to dinner.

name: Silk Wrap Blouse
description: A fluid silk-touch wrap blouse in an ivory tone. Effortlessly elegant — pairs with tailored trousers or high-waisted skirts.

name: Slim Fit Jeans
description: Classic slim-fit denim jeans in a mid-rise cut with a slight stretch for all-day comfort. A wardrobe staple that never goes out of style.

name: Tailored Wool Trousers
description: Sharply tailored trousers in a wool-blend fabric with a straight leg and pressed crease. Elevates any formal or smart-casual outfit.

name: Pleated Midi Skirt
description: A flowy pleated midi skirt in a solid sand tone that moves beautifully with every step. Dress it up or keep it casual with a tucked-in tee.

name: Wide-Leg Trousers
description: Fluid wide-leg trousers in a lightweight crepe fabric. A modern silhouette that reads effortlessly chic whether dressed up or down.

name: Classic Trench Coat
description: A timeless double-breasted trench coat in a neutral camel tone with storm flaps and adjustable belt. Iconic outerwear that handles light rain with elegance.

name: Structured Blazer
description: A single-breasted blazer with clean lapels and a fitted silhouette. The cornerstone of a minimal wardrobe — pairs with everything.

name: Oversized Wool Coat
description: A luxuriously oversized coat in a heavy wool-cashmere blend with clean, architectural lines. The ultimate cold-weather investment piece.

name: Longline Coat
description: A sweeping longline coat in camel bouclé with a clean notched collar. Throws over any outfit and instantly elevates the look.

name: Linen Slip Dress
description: A relaxed linen slip dress in warm ivory. Effortlessly simple — layer over a fitted tee or wear alone on the warmest days.

name: Satin Midi Dress
description: A fluid satin midi dress with a bias-cut silhouette and thin adjustable straps. Effortlessly transitions from day to evening.

name: Column Evening Dress
description: A sleek column dress in matte jersey with a cowl neckline and barely-there straps. Understated luxury for special occasions.

name: Linen Shirt Dress
description: A relaxed button-through shirt dress in washed linen with chest pockets and a self-tie belt. Wear it loose or cinched for two distinct looks.

name: Classic White Sneakers
description: Clean low-top leather sneakers with a cushioned insole and rubber outsole. The most versatile shoe you will ever own.

name: Suede Penny Loafers
description: Soft suede penny loafers with leather lining and a stacked heel. Smart enough for the office, relaxed enough for the weekend.

name: Chelsea Leather Boots
description: Sleek pull-on Chelsea boots in full-grain leather with elastic side panels and a block heel. Built to last through many seasons.

name: Strappy Block Heels
description: Open-toe strappy sandals on a stable block heel in smooth vegan leather. Comfortable enough to dance in, elegant enough for a wedding.

name: Structured Tote Bag
description: A large structured tote in pebbled leather with an interior laptop sleeve and magnetic closure. The ideal work-to-weekend carryall.

name: Merino Wool Scarf
description: A generously sized merino wool scarf in a versatile herringbone pattern. Lightweight yet incredibly warm — a cold-season essential.

name: Leather Crossbody Bag
description: A compact crossbody in smooth full-grain leather with an adjustable strap and clean hardware. Everything you need, nothing you don't.

name: Wide-Brim Sun Hat
description: A natural straw wide-brim hat with a grosgrain ribbon band and UPF 50+ protection. The perfect companion for beach days and outdoor travel.
